title: Iran’s Nimbus Manticore Used Trojanized Zoom Installers Against US Firms
description: Iran’s Nimbus Manticore hackers used trojanized Zoom installers to deploy malware against US firms during a wider IRGC linked cyber campaign.

title: I joyfully reunited with my first Linux distro at the Virtual OS Museum | ZDNET
description: Feeling nostalgic? From Amiga Unix to XVM/RSX, anyone can run over 570 extinct OSes. Try it now on Linux, MacOS, or Windows.

title: Zig President Says AI Coding Contributions Are 'Invariably Garbage' - Business Insider
description: Zig, an open-source programming language bans contributors from using AI. Its president said that the these submissions have "no value whatsoever."
